label: 460l–33 Management of reclamation lands

children.label: A
children.text: filing fees for applications and other documents concerning entry upon and use of Reclamation lands;

children.label: C
children.text: charges or commissions for the use of Reclamation lands.

children.label: A
children.text: to carry out the provisions of this section and section 460–34 of this title;l

children.label: B
children.text: to ensure the protection, comfort, and well-being of the public (including the protection of public safety) with respect to the use of Reclamation lands; and

children.label: C
children.text: to ensure the protection of resource values.

prepare and maintain on a continuing basis an inventory of resources and uses made of Reclamation lands and resources, keep records of such inventory, and make such records available to the public; and
ascertain the boundaries of Reclamation lands and provide a means for public identification (including, where appropriate, providing signs and maps).

children.label: A
children.text: The Secretary, acting through the Commissioner of Reclamation, is authorized to develop, maintain, and revise resource management plans for Reclamation lands.1So in original. No par. (2) has been enacted.1

children.label: i
children.text: shall be consistent with applicable laws (including any applicable statute, regulation, or Executive order);

children.label: I
children.text: such heads of Federal and non-Federal departments or agencies as the Secretary determines to be appropriate; and

children.label: II
children.text: the authorized beneficiaries (as determined by the Secretary) of any Reclamation project included in the plan; and

children.label: iii
children.text: shall be developed with appropriate public participation.

children.label: C
children.text: Each plan described in subparagraph (A) shall provide for the development, use, conservation, protection, enhancement, and management of resources of Reclamation lands in a manner that is compatible with the authorized purposes of the Reclamation project associated with the Reclamation lands.

children.heading: Nonreimbursable funds
children.label: d Nonreimbursable funds
children.text: Funds expended by the Secretary in carrying out the provisions of this part shall be nonreimbursable under the Federal reclamation laws (the Act of (, chapter 1093; ), and Acts supplementary thereto and amendatory thereof).June 17, 190232 Stat. 38843 U.S.C. 3712See References in Text note below.2
